product_state.decision: Candidate CC0 seed corpus is staged for Gate Zero dry runs. It is not a frozen benchmark corpus until the decider signs freeze_record.signed_by and competitors are pinned.

rules.freeze: Gate Zero is invalid until frozen=true with decider sign-off (ADR-0000, plan row 0.3). Corpus changes after kickoff void the measurement (PRD 1.3). One artifact, one name: every gate measures against this file only.
rules.g1_hosts: G1 must pass independently on every host listed under hardware with role=performance. No averaging, no host substitution.
rules.subsets: Gates reference declared subsets by name; born_digital is the G1 subset. G3 runs on the full frozen corpus.

corpus.provenance: Copied from fixtures/synthetic/simple-text/document.pdf; synthetic CC0 parser smoke seed.
Copied from fixtures/synthetic/two-lines/document.pdf; synthetic CC0 paragraph grouping seed.
Copied from fixtures/synthetic/two-columns/document.pdf; synthetic CC0 multi-column ordering seed.
Copied from fixtures/synthetic/rotation-90/document.pdf; synthetic CC0 rotated-page seed.
Copied from fixtures/synthetic/hyphenated-line-break/document.pdf; synthetic CC0 hyphenation/font quirk seed.
Copied from fixtures/synthetic/ligature-fi-embedded-font/document.pdf; synthetic CC0 embedded-font ligature seed.

subsets: born_digital | security | failure | fonts | rotation | tables | multi_column | hyphenation | ligatures

hardware.cpu: Apple M4 Pro, 12 cores (8 performance, 4 efficiency)
AMD EPYC 7742 64-Core Processor, 2 vCPU, 1 core/socket, 2 threads/core

windows_x64_note: Windows x64 joins nightly determinism no later than Milestone B exit (week 14 under ADR-0001 reduced-staff schedule); unresolved divergence blocks or re-scopes Public Beta.
todo_before_freeze: Decider either accepts this staged CC0 seed corpus as Gate Zero v1 or adds broader redistributable born-digital PDFs.
Set frozen=true only after corpus scope is final.
Freeze benchmarks/competitors.lock.json with exact versions and artifact hashes.
Run python3 .github/scripts/readiness_gate.py gate-zero and make -C benchmarks/harness bench.
